intent: Replace the failed 2D rain overlay/portal/replay primary path with world-space rain particles and authoritative architecture profiles.
systems_touched: new V222 world rain particle renderer
new V222 rain coverage/open sky maps

critical_design.bath_main: uses real bath building door; bath_garden hedge is explicitly ignored as door semantics
critical_design.open_canopies: bar, game room and yoga are treated as open canopies with no fake doors
critical_design.legacy_rain: 2D rain buffer/door portal/V216 replay is not primary when V222 world rain is active
critical_design.occlusion: samples of each drop are tested against ZBuffer and CeilingDepthBuffer instead of drawing one full 2D line

visual_tests_required: bath outside hedge: rain must fall normally, no hedge gate as bath door
bath real building door: no rain from ceiling/architrave
reception door/inside: no rain born from ceiling
bar/yoga/game room: open canopy behavior, no fake doors
general walls: rain hidden by ZBuffer
general roofs/canopies: rain clipped by CeilingDepthBuffer
known_limits: No real browser visual test was executed in container; user visual validation is required.
Particle density/alpha may need artistic tuning after real test, but the architecture is no longer the V201-V221 overlay/replay model.
